title: stachys germanica var. intermedia
intro: Stachys germanica var. intermedia, also known as hedging betony, is a variety of the German betony plant, a perennial herb native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving anxiety and insomnia, and may help to improve cognitive function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Stachys germanica var. intermedia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
